creator: jhanna@pangolin-systems.com
text:
The two Ethernet interfaces on an NVIDIA nForce 680i based motherboard are
recognized as nfe0 and nfe1. They seem to obey media selection and do
receive packets, but transmitted packets don't seem to be actually sent.
The PHY is detected as a Marvell 88E1116.
May be related to PR: 106359.
